---
title: "Kodehjørnet ved UiS"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

This is a blog on data analysis and coding with `R` by political science students at the University of Stavanger (UiS), Norway.

---
